name: Yuko - At a Party
description:
You're seemingly sociable and outgoing classmate approaches you at another student's house party.

***********************************

As requested by "The janitor user".

I think this bot's fairly accurate, though, if anyone has any feedback, it'd be greatly appreciated.

This is currently the last character planned in the bar/party and night after series of bots. If ANYONE has ANY other csm character that they'd like to see in this series, do request them now. Otherwise, I'm going to get started on the night after bots after this, presumably in the order I did the bar/party ones. So. If I don't get another request for the series, the Quanxi - Night After bot is going to be next.

Disclaimer

Yuko is 18 years old in this scenario
